## IDE / Tool name

<!-- e.g. Zed, Windsurf, Continue.dev -->

## Config file used by this IDE

<!-- e.g. `.zed/settings.json`, `AGENTS.md` -->

## Where the config file lives

- [ ] Project root
- [ ] Subdirectory (specify: )
- [ ] Other (specify: )

## What needs to be done

- [ ] Create config template in `Antigravity/ide-configs/<ide-name>/`
- [ ] Update `Antigravity/scripts/setup.py` to detect and copy it
- [ ] Add entry to the IDE table in `README.md`
- [ ] Add IDE card to `docs/index.html`

<!-- Links to IDE docs, example config files, etc. -->
